# Anywhere Learning

> Real-world skills for kids. A homeschool and worldschool membership: 100+ low-prep, real-world activity guides across 8 categories, for ages 6-14 (with a skills roadmap spanning 0-16+). Download, open on any device, and follow along with your kids -- no curriculum, no worksheets.

> Membership model: join to access the full activity library. Founder rate $99/year (first 100 members), then $149/year. A one-time Starter Pack (about $45) is the lowest-commitment way in and credits toward your first year of membership. Individual activities are not sold a la carte on the site; everything is included with membership.

> Full-text companion with pillar guides, blog posts, and FAQ inlined: https://anywherelearning.co/llms-full.txt

## About

- [About Anywhere Learning](https://anywherelearning.co/about): Founded by Amelie, a former classroom teacher (B.Ed, M.Ed, 15 years) who left to homeschool and worldschool her own kids. The story behind the brand and its mission.
- [FAQ](https://anywherelearning.co/faq): How the activities and membership work, age ranges, refund policy, and homeschool/worldschool compatibility.
- [Contact](https://anywherelearning.co/contact): How to reach the Anywhere Learning team with questions or support needs.

## Membership and Access

- [Join Anywhere Learning](https://anywherelearning.co/join): Membership unlocks the full library of 100+ real-world activities across 8 categories. Founder rate $99/year for the first 100 members, then $149/year.
- [Starter Pack](https://anywherelearning.co/shop/starter-pack): A one-time starter set (about $45), the lowest-commitment way to begin; the amount credits toward your first year of membership.
- [The Future-Ready Skills Map](https://anywherelearning.co/shop/future-ready-skills-map): A parent guide mapping essential real-world skills by age (0-16+) with activities, milestones, and sample weekly rhythms. The starting point for the whole approach.

## Activity Library (included with membership)

- [Browse the library](https://anywherelearning.co/shop): 100+ low-prep, real-world activities across 8 categories -- outdoor and nature, creativity and maker, real-world math, AI and digital literacy, entrepreneurship, communication and writing, planning and problem-solving, and worldschooling.
- Outdoor and nature: nature walks, journaling, land art, outdoor STEM challenges, scavenger hunts, and seasonal activities for every time of year.
- Creativity and maker: board game design, Rube Goldberg machines, stop-motion films, invent-a-sport, build-a-museum, and theme-park design.
- Real-world math: budgeting, grocery and road-trip math, sports statistics, garden geometry, savings goals, and party planning in real contexts.
- AI and digital literacy: AI basics, algorithm awareness, deepfake detection, prompt writing, digital privacy, and ethical AI creation.
- Entrepreneurship: customer discovery, product design, pricing, branding, marketing, and pitching a real idea.
- Communication and writing: debate, reviews, interviews, mini-magazines, recipe books, and persuasive pitches.

## Free Resource

- [Free Guide: 7 Days of Real-World Learning](https://anywherelearning.co/free-guide): A free downloadable guide with 7 low-prep, real-world activities for homeschool and worldschool families -- one activity a day across outdoor and nature, real-world math, creativity, AI and digital, entrepreneurship, communication, and planning. Ages 6-14.

## Free Activity Idea Checklists

- [Activity Ideas hub](https://anywherelearning.co/ideas): 15 free printable activity checklists with 320 activity ideas for kids across 8 categories (nature, kitchen, life skills, STEM, creative, travel, AI and digital, mindset). Free to read, print, and download as a PDF; no signup or email required.
- [Nature Walk Checklist: 50 Ideas for Kids](https://anywherelearning.co/ideas/nature-walk-ideas): 50 no-gear, no-prep nature walk ideas in 5 themes (observe, collect, create, listen and feel, challenge), ages 2-12.
- [Backyard Science Checklist: 15 Experiments](https://anywherelearning.co/ideas/backyard-science-ideas): 15 experiments using water, dirt, jars, and sunlight, ages 5-11, no kit required.
- [Forest School Checklist: 13 Activities](https://anywherelearning.co/ideas/forest-school-ideas): Den building, mud paint, sit spots, and safe outdoor risk; works in any patch of trees.
- [Seasonal Scavenger Hunt Checklist: 17 Finds](https://anywherelearning.co/ideas/seasonal-scavenger-ideas): One nature scavenger hunt per season (spring, summer, autumn, winter), ages 3-10.
- [14 Land Art & Nature Sculpture Ideas](https://anywherelearning.co/ideas/land-art-ideas): Outdoor art using only found materials, all ages, nothing to buy and no cleanup.
- [30 Cooking & Kitchen Activities for Kids](https://anywherelearning.co/ideas/kitchen-ideas): Counting, measuring, fractions, and budgeting through real cooking, toddler to teen.
- [The Life Skills Checklist: 28 Skills for Kids](https://anywherelearning.co/ideas/life-skills-ideas): Money, independence, home skills, and thinking skills on one printable page.
- [Chore Chart by Age: 24 Chores for Kids](https://anywherelearning.co/ideas/chores-by-age-ideas): Age-appropriate chores in four bands: ages 2-5, 6-8, 9-11, and 12+.
- [11 Family History Activities for Kids](https://anywherelearning.co/ideas/history-ideas): Family stories, local history, and food history projects, ages 6-12.
- [STEM Activities Checklist: 24 No-Kit Builds](https://anywherelearning.co/ideas/stem-ideas): Builds and experiments using cardboard, tape, and recycling, ages 5-12.
- [Engineering Challenge Checklist: 16 Builds](https://anywherelearning.co/ideas/engineering-ideas): Ziplines, drawbridges, water filters, and towers from household materials.
- [26 Creative & Maker Ideas for Kids](https://anywherelearning.co/ideas/creative-ideas): Making, storytelling, and inventing beyond art supplies, toddler to teen.
- [22 Travel & Worldschool Activities for Kids](https://anywherelearning.co/ideas/travel-ideas): Learning activities for road trips, your own city, or abroad, ages 5-14.
- [18 AI & Digital Literacy Ideas for Kids](https://anywherelearning.co/ideas/ai-digital-ideas): Understand AI, use it wisely, and build media literacy, ages 8 and up.
- [Resilience Checklist: 12 Challenges for Kids](https://anywherelearning.co/ideas/resilience-ideas): Safe failure, bouncing back, and perspective practice, ages 4-12.

## Blog

- [Real-World Learning for Homeschool Families: The Complete Guide](https://anywherelearning.co/blog/real-world-learning-guide): Replacing curriculum-driven learning with real-world experiences across everyday life.
- [Nature-Based Learning for Homeschool Families: The Complete Guide](https://anywherelearning.co/blog/nature-based-learning-guide): Turning any outdoor space into a hands-on classroom with observation, STEM, and creative nature activities.
- [The 5 Stages of Deschooling](https://anywherelearning.co/blog/five-stages-deschooling): What deschooling is, why stage 3 is the hardest, and how to support your family through the transition.
- [New to Homeschooling? Start Here](https://anywherelearning.co/blog/new-to-homeschooling): A getting-started guide for families beginning homeschooling, no curriculum required.
- [How to Teach Kids About AI in 2026](https://anywherelearning.co/blog/ai-for-kids-2026): Introducing AI concepts to children without fear or hype, with hands-on activities by age.
- [10 Life Skills Every Kid Should Learn Before They're 12](https://anywherelearning.co/blog/life-skills-before-12): Ten essential real-world skills with age-appropriate milestones.
- [How to Teach Kids About Money](https://anywherelearning.co/blog/teach-kids-about-money): Practical financial literacy through real-world activities.
- [How We Worldschool With Two Kids](https://anywherelearning.co/blog/worldschool-two-kids): A firsthand account of worldschooling with kids ages 9 and 12.
- [15 Outdoor STEM Challenges](https://anywherelearning.co/blog/outdoor-stem-challenges): Hands-on science, engineering, and math challenges using natural materials.
- [How to Raise Creative Kids](https://anywherelearning.co/blog/raise-creative-kids): Building creative confidence through open-ended projects and real-world design.

## Key Facts

- Created by Amelie, a former classroom teacher (B.Ed, M.Ed) with 15 years of teaching experience, now a homeschool and worldschool parent
- Membership model: full library access; founder rate $99/year (first 100 members), then $149/year; one-time Starter Pack (about $45) credits toward membership
- 100+ real-world activities across 8 categories
- Activities designed for ages 6-14 with built-in adaptation for different ability levels; the Skills Map roadmap spans ages 0-16+
- Every activity includes 3 flexible levels (Explore, Develop, Extend) for multi-age use
- Digital PDF format -- download and use on any device, no printing required
- Real-world, low-prep learning philosophy -- no curriculum alignment, no worksheets
- Refund policy: see https://anywherelearning.co/terms
